Interface CountryStringType

All Superinterfaces:
EidasAttributeValueType, XMLObject, XSString
All Known Subinterfaces:
CountryOfBirthType, CountryOfResidenceType, NationalityType
All Known Implementing Classes:
CountryOfBirthTypeImpl, CountryOfResidenceTypeImpl, CountryStringTypeImpl, NationalityTypeImpl
public interface CountryStringType extends XSString, EidasAttributeValueType
Interface for eIDAS attribute values that represent country codes.
Author:
Martin Lindström
